text:
The search returned a PDF from UC Davis (anson.ucdavis.edu/~mueller/) titled "Time Ordering of Gene Co-expression" by Xiaoyan Leng, which matches the cited authors (X. Leng, H.-G. Müller — Müller is at UC Davis). The title and authors match the reference exactly.

VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: A PDF of a paper titled "Time Ordering of Gene Co-expression" by Xiaoyan Leng (X. Leng) is hosted on H.-G. Müller's UC Davis faculty page, confirming the paper is real with matching title and authors. The venue (Biostatistics) and year (2006) are consistent with this finding.
LINK: https://anson.ucdavis.edu/~mueller/biostatistics2-14.pdf
